title: Sins Loathed, And Yet Loved.
content:
Shame checks our first attempts; but then 'tis prov'd
    Sins first dislik'd are after that belov'd.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Sins Loathed, And Yet Loved."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
